practice.name: Problem 12.4.5 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: I am thinking of 3 integers. Added two at a time their sums are 37, 41, 44. What is the product of the 3 integers?

practice.name: Problem 13.2.8 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: Joe drives at a speed of 30 miles per hour for 60 miles. He also drives at 45 miles per hour for 15 miles. Find the average speed of his car.
